message:
feat(beads): add Ecosystem Parity epic with comprehensive sub-epics

Created 36 new beads for the Ecosystem Parity epic to make Asupersync
a complete Tokio ecosystem replacement:

Sub-Epics:
- WebSocket Protocol (RFC 6455): frame codec, handshake, client, server,
  close protocol, split read/write, E2E tests
- Platform Reactors: unified Reactor trait, kqueue (macOS), IOCP (Windows),
  epoll fallback (Linux), E2E tests
- Message Queue Clients: NATS (core + JetStream), Redis (commands + Pub/Sub +
  Streams), Kafka (producer + consumer), E2E tests
- Async File I/O: io_uring file integration, async directory operations
- Database Stack: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite drivers, connection pooling,
  E2E tests (raided from sqlmodel_rust)
- Runtime Debug Console: console primitives, region tree visualization,
  'explain why' diagnostics (raided from rich_rust)

All beads include:
- Detailed design with code examples
- Cancel-correct semantics documentation
- Cx integration points
- Comprehensive acceptance criteria
- E2E test requirements with structured logging

Dependencies properly structured with parent-child and blocking relationships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
